title: stipa roborowskyi
intro: Stipa roborowskyi, also known as Roborovski's feather grass, is a species of grass native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa roborowskyi include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used in the form of a poultice or topical application.
